complaints.message:
Confirm object visual appearance.
Requirements:
- make sure there is only one rigid body.
- make sure the object has a valid texture or appearance.
- make sure the object has all parts necessary.

Confirm object visual appearance.
Requirements:
- make sure there is only one rigid body.
- make sure the object has a valid texture or appearance.
- make sure the object has all parts necessary.

Check if the object looks like it absolutely MUST be a soft body.
Requirements:
- type 'cloth' if you think the object can reasonably be simulated by 2D cloth.
- type 'soft' if it needs to be soft but still needs to have a volume.
- just hit enter without typing anything if the object does NOT have to be a soft body.

SUBSTANCE: Confirm if object should be a rigid body, cloth, or substance.
If it's marked softBody or rope, that means it will be a rigid body for now, which is OK.

Currently, it is annotated as: cloth.

Enter one of "rigidBody", "liquid", "macroPhysicalSubstance", "microPhysicalSubstance", "visualSubstance", "cloth", "softBody", "rope" to change.

ABILITIES: Confirm that this object can support all of the abilities seen below.

Abilities to evaluate (subset of all abilities): 
    cloth: True
    coldSource: False
    fillable: False
    heatSource: False
    openable: False
    particleApplier: False
    particleRemover: False
    particleSink: False
    particleSource: False
    toggleable: False

If this object looks like it should have some of these abilities flipped, please
list the abilities that we should flip for this object as a comma separated list.
For example, for an unopenable window you would put in 'openable'.
